parameters: \N<Kaede>Y-You're not the one who needs to apologize!
The one at fault... is that bastard, Shimoyama...
I'm the one at fault first.
Being creampied... And even having anal sex!
That's how I found about you two staying here.
I want you to think about it carefully...
\N<Kaede>At the beginning, I really hated it,
I couldn't think of anything else...
\N<Kaede>You see... I... from the very beginning...
\N<Kaede>But how to say it... that guy was...
\N<Kaede>He only focused on my pleasurable areas...
At him, staring at me with that smirk...
At myself, unable to suppress my voice...
It felt like I was being pressed down...
\N<Kaede>I didn't want to make any noise...
I could tell he'd be pleased if I did...
\N<Kaede>But... I couldn't hold back at all...
\N<Kaede>Gradually... my whole body started to tingle.
I felt shivers down my spine...
Am I different from him... after all...?
Just because his is just huge...?
I went a little crazy there.
H-How long have you been here?
How long have you been watching... us?
I just got here a little while ago.
\N<Kaede>I-I was out of my mind, but it's over now.
I don't know what got over me. Let's stop.
I think he's in the bath...
